spec = {"pregunta": "comparar totales", "audiencia": "ejecutivo", "chart": "bar"}

def elige_chart(pregunta):
    return "line" if "tendencia" in pregunta else "bar"

print(elige_chart("tendencia mensual"))
print(elige_chart("comparar regiones"))

a, b = 50.0, 45.0
honesto = (a - b) / a
truco = (a - b) / (a - 40)
print(round(truco / honesto, 2))

ylim_bottom = 0
print("honesto" if ylim_bottom == 0 else "revisar")

import matplotlib

ax.bar([0, 1], [1, 2])
ax.set_ylim(0, 3)
print(ax.get_ylim()[0] == 0)
plt.close(fig)

import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def meta_bar(labels, values):
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.bar(labels, values)
    ax.set_ylim(0, max(values) * 1.2)
    out = {"n_bars": len(values), "ylim0": ax.get_ylim()[0] == 0}
    plt.close(fig)
    return out

print(meta_bar(["A", "B"], [3, 4]))

import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig, (ax0, ax1) = plt.subplots(1, 2)
ax0.set_title("Vol")
ax1.set_title("Med")
print([ax0.get_title(), ax1.get_title()])
plt.close(fig)

rows = [{"region": "Lima", "median": 28}, {"region": "Cusco", "median": 22}]
row = next(r for r in rows if r["region"] == "Lima")
print(row["median"])

region, v, n = "Lima", 28, 40
print(f"{region}: {v} PEN (n={n})")

table = [{"region": "Lima", "v": 28}, {"region": "Cusco", "v": 22}]
print("; ".join(f"{r['region']}={r['v']} PEN" for r in table))
print("Unidad: PEN | Fuente: sintetico")

cap = {"unidad": "PEN", "fuente": "x", "limitacion": "web"}
print(set(cap.keys()) >= {"unidad", "fuente", "limitacion"})

alt = "Lima 28 PEN n=40"
print("n=" in alt)

def classify_claim(text):
    return "PERMITIDO" if "muestra" in text else "RECHAZADO"

print(classify_claim("Lima lidera en la muestra web"))
print(classify_claim("Lima es la mejor del Perú"))
